revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_repair here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Citation_repair for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

; Source citation guidelines
* [[Wikipedia:Citing sources]]
* [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources]]
* [[Wikipedia:Verifiability]]

; Citation repair templates
* {{Tl|Full citation needed}} – the catch-all
* {{Tl|Author missing}}
:* {{Tl|Author incomplete}} – a variant for partial data
* {{Tl|Date missing}}
* {{Tl|ISBN missing}}
* {{Tl|Place missing}}
* {{Tl|Publisher missing}}
* {{Tl|Title missing}}
:* {{Tl|Title incomplete}} – a variant for partial data
* {{Tl|Year missing}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation|content=
This isn't really a template ''per se''; it's transcluded repetitive template documentation (see "What links here" to see which /doc pages use it).

[[Category:Documentation see also templates]]
}}
</noinclude>
